raw_response: After at most 2 retries, the Founder stops retrying The failure is reported to the Boss with the last error text The agent is never silently dropped from the deliverable The compliance footer states 5 agents planned, 4 produced, and why

content:
Prime contract, 5 agents. Agent 3 (Data/Analytics) fails on every attempt -
its analysis step errors out three consecutive times with the same
exception.

After at most 2 retries, the Founder stops retrying The failure is reported to the Boss with the last error text The agent is never silently dropped from the deliverable The compliance footer states 5 agents planned, 4 produced, and why
